$comment: Codebase Intelligence hooks for Cursor. Uses `{oak-cli-command} ci hook` command for cross-platform compatibility. OAK hooks are identified by the {oak-cli-command} ci hook command pattern.

sessionStart.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook sessionStart --agent cursor || true

beforeSubmitPrompt.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook beforeSubmitPrompt --agent cursor || true

afterFileEdit.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook afterFileEdit --agent cursor || true

afterAgentResponse.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook afterAgentResponse --agent cursor || true

afterAgentThought.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook afterAgentThought --agent cursor || true

postToolUse.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook postToolUse --agent cursor || true

preCompact.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook preCompact --agent cursor || true

stop.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook stop --agent cursor || true

sessionEnd.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook sessionEnd --agent cursor || true

postToolUseFailure.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook postToolUseFailure --agent cursor || true

subagentStart.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook subagentStart --agent cursor || true

subagentStop.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook subagentStop --agent cursor || true
